input: Just finished a robotic LAR for rectal cancer in OR 12. Today is April 16.
Did an open Hartmann reversal today in OR 8. Patient had recurrent diverticulitis with prior Hartmann six months ago.
Had a rough one today. Airway issues at induction, nearly canceled. Eventually got in and did a lap sigmoid for diverticulitis, OR 4.
Did a TaTME for low rectal cancer, OR 7, robotic-assisted.
Robotic LAR plus diverting loop ileostomy for rectal cancer, OR 12.
Robotic right hemi for cancer today. I can't remember the room — it was the one next to the Aesculap room.
TPC with IPAA today for UC, OR 9.
The one I did yesterday, you know which one.
Obstructing sigmoid cancer, lap Hartmann in OR 4 this morning.
